- [CoPaw](https://github​.com/agentscope-ai/CoPaw)
- [ZeptoClaw](https://github​.com/qhkm/zeptoclaw)
- [EasyClaw](https://github​.com/gaoyangz77/easyclaw)

---

## OpenClaw 项目深度报告

# OpenClaw 项目动态日报 (2026-03-22)

## 1. 今日速览
OpenClaw 项目今日在 GitHub 上呈现**极高活跃度**，过去 24 小时内 Issues 与 Pull Requests 的更新量均达到 500 条，显示出项目正处于快速迭代期，同时也伴随着显著的并发维护压力。社区讨论集中在 **2026.3.13 版本引入的多个回归问题** 上，特别是 Gateway 权限管理和频道连接稳定性方面，导致用户反馈较为强烈。开发团队正在积极通过密集提交 PR 进行“地毯式”修复，重点解决了敏感信息泄露和系统崩溃等高风险漏洞，整体项目处于“高能高压”的治理状态。

## 2. 版本发布
**无新版本发布。**
目前项目代码库主要基于 `v2026.3.13` 进行修复。鉴于今日暴露的多个严重回归和路径安全问题，预计近期将迎来修复补丁版本（如 `v2026.3.14`）。

## 3. 项目进展
今日 PR 讨论区展现了极强的修复响应能力，多个关键稳定性与安全性改进正在推进中：

*   **安全性加固**：[PR #51344](https://github​.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51344) 和 [PR #51711](https://github​.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51711) 修复了严重的**信息泄露漏洞**。前者防止了包含 PII（个人身份信息）的原始抓取错误被发布到公开频道，后者解决了损坏的会话记录导致敏感 API 错误信息泄露的问题。
*   **稳定性增强**：[PR #51751](https://github​.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51751) 处理了音频处理依赖缺失时的优雅降级，防止因缺少 `ffprobe` 导致 WebSocket 崩溃。
*   **架构改进**：[PR #49431](https://github​.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/49431) 引入“待处理入站存储”和“活跃轮次跟踪”，旨在实现 Gateway 重启时的无损恢复，解决长期存在的状态同步难题。

## 4. 社区热点
*   **[严重尴尬] 硬编码开发者路径被合并发布**
    *   **Issue**: [#51429](https://github​.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/51429) (👍 引发社区围观)
    *   **摘要**: 最新版本代码被指硬编码了开发者个人路径 `/Users/wangtao`，导致所有用户安装时会在系统根目录创建该文件夹并设为工作区。这引发了关于 CI/CD 流程审查和代码规范的热烈讨论。
*   **[需求] 国际化支

items.title: Add standardized table cell components and style guide reference
items.content:
## Summary

- Adds 5 new cell components to `table-primitives.tsx`: `CellCurrency`, `CellNumber`, `CellPercent`, `CellDate`, `CellStatus`
- Exports all cell primitives from `ds/index.ts` so they're available via a single import path
- Adds a comprehensive **Table Cell Components** section to the style guide at `/style-guide` with a live demo table, per-component showcases with code snippets, and a Forbidden Patterns reference

## Why

Every time a table was built, the data formatting (currency, dates, status colors, truncation) had to be corrected manually after the fact. These standardized components enforce consistent formatting and null handling across all tables, and the style guide section makes the correct pattern unambiguous.

## Test plan

- [ ] Visit `/style-guide` and verify the new Table Cell Components section renders correctly
- [ ] Confirm live demo table shows all cell types with sample data
- [ ] Confirm StatusBadge shows correct colors for all status variants
- [ ] Confirm TruncatedCell shows tooltip on hover for long text
- [ ] Confirm TableRowActionsMenu dropdown opens on click

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **New Features**
  * Added reusable table cell components for currencies, numbers, percentages, dates, and statuses with consistent empty-state handling and improved date input support.
* **Design System**
  * Exposed these table cell primitives from the central design-system entrypoint for simpler imports.
* **Documentation**
  * Expanded the style guide with a “Table Cell Components” section, live reference table, usage examples, and forbidden-pattern guidance.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
items.author: MeganHarrison

items.title: feat(winnie): 20 enhanced skills with Common Gotchas & trigger-based descriptions
items.content:
## What

Adds 20 skills from Winnie's collection to the shared skills repo, all enhanced based on Thariq's 'Lessons from Building Claude Code: How We Use Skills' article.

## Key Improvements Applied

**Trigger-based descriptions** — Every skill's description now tells the model WHEN to activate, not just what it does. This is the routing mechanism that makes skill selection reliable.

**Common Gotchas sections** — Added to 9 skills. Per Thariq, this is the highest-signal content in any skill. Captures real failure modes agents hit in practice.

**Progressive disclosure** — Kept SKILL.md lean, moved detailed references to subdirectories.

## Skills Added

items.title: feat: add Claude Code Python hooks (security, git-checkpoint, DEPS planning)
items.content:
Adds 3 Claude Code (Python) hooks to complement the OpenClaw TypeScript hooks:

- **pre-tool-security**: Consolidated PreToolUse security gate — blocks dangerous commands, protected paths, with fast-path optimization for low-risk tools
- **git-checkpoint**: Auto-creates git stash checkpoints before destructive Bash operations (rm -rf, git reset --hard, DROP TABLE, etc.)
- **deps-planning**: Soft UserPromptSubmit gate that injects DEPS planning guidance for complex multi-step tasks

All hooks are cross-platform (Windows/Linux/macOS) and currently deployed on Winnie's system.

Author: Winnie

Release notes

Sourced from openclaw's releases.

openclaw 2026.3.13

This recovery release uses v2026.3.13-1 because GitHub immutable releases do not allow reusing v2026.3.13 after publication.

Important:

  • This release exists to recover the broken v2026.3.13 tag/release path.
  • The corresponding npm version is still 2026.3.13, not 2026.3.13-1.
  • The -1 suffix is for the Git tag and GitHub Release only.

What's Changed

  • fix(compaction): use full-session token count for post-compaction sanity check by @​efe-arv in openclaw/openclaw#28347
  • fix(telegram): thread media transport policy into SSRF by @​obviyus in openclaw/openclaw#44639
  • fix: handle Discord gateway metadata fetch failures by @​jalehman in openclaw/openclaw#44397
  • docs: move post-release changelog entries to Unreleased by @​jalehman in openclaw/openclaw#44691
